steps.title: Use the concluding sentence
steps.content: The text introduces Torchy Brown, explains that its story reflects the Great Migration, and concludes that the strip shows how Ormes used comics to comment on issues affecting Black Americans.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported claims
steps.content: Choice A invents influence on other Black women comic strip writers. Choice B contradicts the passage, which says Ormes continued addressing such issues rather than changed subjects. Choice D invents a claim about characters based on people she knew. The text mainly gives an example of Ormes's comic commentary. The answer is C.
